name: Third party equipment caused my occupational illness in Draper, can I sue them?

mainEntity.name: Third party equipment caused my occupational illness in Draper, can I sue them?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue third parties for full damages including noneconomic.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah's exclusive remedy doesn't bar suing negligent third parties outside employer.[1] Prove duty, breach, causation.[1] Key factors: Manufacturer defects common; no workers' comp cap on damages; add pain/suffering.[1] Preserve evidence like faulty gear. Hire personal injury lawyer for max recovery beyond comp.

description: Yes, sue third parties for full damages including noneconomic.[1]
